description: User clicks on the Macquarie Bank search result link
Page navigates to the Macquarie Bank home loan refinance page
User examines the content on the Macquarie Bank refinance page, specifically looking at interest rates

User scrolls down through the Google search results to view more options
frame_description: Scrolling past results for ubank, Heritage Bank, and ANZ.

User pauses to read the newly appeared task instructions
